title: Navier-Stokes Periodic Energy Identity Bounded Subclaim

claims.text: The Navier-Stokes periodic energy identity packet has a reference kernel receipt whose bounded Taylor-Green identity probe reports MATCH within declared tolerances.
claims.falsification: The run receipt is missing, the bounded_identity_probe is not MATCH, or the energy/dissipation/residual/divergence measurements exceed tolerance.

claims.text: The Navier-Stokes periodic energy identity packet explicitly keeps the parent Navier-Stokes Millennium problem UNVERIFIABLE.
claims.falsification: The packet or run receipt claims the parent Navier-Stokes existence and smoothness problem is solved or verified.

claims.text: The packet includes negative boundaries that block promoting a finite grid or smooth-field identity check into a global regularity theorem.
claims.falsification: The packet omits negative boundaries or states that a finite grid check proves the continuous grand theorem.
